---
name: Feature or plugin idea
about: Propose a new capability, node, or plugin seam
title: ""
labels: enhancement
---

**What you want to do**
The data task or workflow you're trying to accomplish (not just the mechanism).

**Owning surface or evidence (when relevant)**
Name the Workspace item, Canvas, dataset/revision, Task/Job/Attempt, receipt, or backend/provider
that shows the current limitation. Not every idea has one.

**Proposed shape**
A change to an existing surface, a new built-in operation, or a plugin through an existing seam? For
a plugin, start with the task-first [plugin onboarding guide](../../docs/PLUGIN_ONBOARDING.md), then
describe the missing boundary or contract.

**Keeping it generic**
Data Playground's core stays provider-agnostic and offline-first. If this is specific to one
backend / store / vendor, note how it could live behind a plugin rather than in the core.
